channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from trusted sources

item.title: 🤖 Ukraine to field 25,000 ground robots for frontline logistics
item.description: Ukraine plans to deploy 25,000 unmanned ground vehicles to replace soldiers in dangerous logistics missions. Ground robots ran over 9,000 frontline missions in March alone, triple November count.

item.title: 🚢 Three US carriers operate in Middle East for first time since 2003
item.description: Three US aircraft carriers are now operating in Central Command area of responsibility simultaneously, reflecting the massive naval buildup amid the Iran conflict.

item.title: ☢️ G7 expresses concern over Russia and China nuclear build-up
item.description: G7 nations voice alarm at expanding nuclear arsenals of Russia and China ahead of month-long NPT review conference. China is rapidly expanding its warhead stockpile while Russia modernizes delivery systems.

item.title: 🇸🇪 NATO eyes Swedish-Canadian jet for AWACS role, shifting from Boeing
item.description: NATO is considering Saab GlobalEye aircraft for airborne early warning missions, moving away from Boeing platforms. Political momentum has been building for the Swedish-Canadian solution.

item.title: ⚡ US military pursues fleet of missile-killing laser drones
item.description: The US military is reviving directed energy weapons programs for airborne platforms to counter missile threats. The initiative aims to protect American airspace from evolving aerial threats.

item.title: 🇫🇰 UK affirms Falklands sovereignty after reported US review
item.description: UK affirms Falklands sovereignty after reported US review.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian drones targeting ships in Strait of Hormuz, US says
item.description: Iranian drones targeting ships in Strait of Hormuz, US says.

item.title: 💰 P&G warns $1 billion profit hit from higher oil prices
item.description: P&G warns $1 billion profit hit from higher oil prices.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany halves 2026 growth forecast amid Iran war
item.description: Germany halves 2026 growth forecast amid Iran war.

item.title: 🔒 UK must brace for rise in state-backed cyberattacks, security chief warns
item.description: UK must brace for rise in state-backed cyberattacks, security chief warns.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO faces unity test as Spain considers suspension
item.description: NATO faces unity test as Spain considers suspension.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Witkoff-Kushner in Pakistan for Iran talks
item.description: Witkoff-Kushner in Pakistan for Iran talks.

item.title: ⚖️ US appeals court rejects Trump's ban on asylum seekers
item.description: US appeals court rejects Trump's ban on asylum seekers.

item.title: 🔫 Trump Justice Department adds firing squads for federal executions
item.description: Trump Justice Department adds firing squads for federal executions.

item.title: ⚖️ Justice Department drops criminal probe of Fed chair Powell
item.description: Justice Department drops criminal probe of Fed chair Powell.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu diagnosed with prostate cancer without informing Israeli public
item.description: Netanyahu diagnosed with prostate cancer without informing Israeli public.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US sanctions China-based oil refinery and 40 shippers over Iran oil
item.description: US sanctions China-based oil refinery and 40 shippers over Iran oil.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China stages navy drill as US and Philippines embark on Balikatan 2026
item.description: China stages navy drill as US and Philippines embark on Balikatan 2026.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Israel become direct threat to global security, Fidan says
item.description: Israel become direct threat to global security, Fidan says.

item.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law, UN warns.
